driveParameter.title: Simply Start
driveParameter.description: Commissioning, speed limits, ramps, start/stop handling, and auto-tuning used for first setup.

driveParameter.title: Command and Reference
driveParameter.description: Command channels, preset speeds, reverse handling, and reference operations.

driveParameter.title: PID and Process
driveParameter.description: PID tuning, process windows, preset PID references, feedback limits, and engineering-unit setup.

driveParameter.title: Pump Applications
driveParameter.description: Multipump architecture, level control, stage/destage logic, sleep/wake, pipe fill, priming, and pump-characteristic functions.

driveParameter.title: Pump Protection
driveParameter.description: Dry-run, anti-jam, low-flow, underload, overload, pressure, feedback, cycle, and thermal monitoring functions.

driveParameter.title: Motor and Drive Core
driveParameter.description: Motor control, tuning, switching frequency, voltage handling, energy saving, and core drive behavior.

driveParameter.title: I/O and Assignments
driveParameter.description: Analog channels, pulse inputs, relays, digital outputs, sensor assignments, and threshold-related I/O setup.

driveParameter.title: Parameter Sets
driveParameter.description: Parameter-set selection, switching configuration, and set contents.

driveParameter.title: Faults and History
driveParameter.description: Current faults, warnings, manual reset behavior, and stored history snapshots.

driveParameter.title: Identity and Nameplate
driveParameter.description: Drive identity, firmware, and nameplate records useful for commissioning and service.

driveParameter.title: Operational Values
driveParameter.description: Live runtime values covering drive state, process, energy, I/O, and pump operation.

driveParameter.title: General Drive Configuration
driveParameter.description: Remaining drive configuration families that do not fit a narrower functional block.

communication.title: Communication Maps
communication.description: Command/status maps, scanner maps, and CANopen map images exposed over fieldbus.

communication.title: Network and Fieldbus
communication.description: Embedded Modbus, communication modules, CANopen, DeviceNet, Profibus, Profinet, and related diagnostics.

communication.title: Communication System
communication.description: Distributed logging and communication-system behavior that does not belong to a narrower fieldbus family.
